# PR Review: #27932 - [iOS][Shell] Fix navigation lifecycle and back button for More tab (>5 tabs)

<details>
<summary><strong>📋 Issue Summary</strong></summary>

**Primary Issue ([#27799](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/27799)): OnAppearing and OnNavigatedTo does not work when using extended Tabbar (tabbar with more than 5 tabs) on iOS**

When loading a page from the extended tabbar (More tab with >5 tabs):
- `OnAppearing` and `OnNavigatedTo` fire correctly on first navigation
- On 2nd page load, only `OnAppearing` fires, `OnNavigatedTo` does not
- Back button: neither event fires
- `Shell.Current.GoToAsync("..")`: only `OnAppearing` fires, not `OnNavigatedTo`
- Events become random/unreliable after these operations

**Related Issues (PR fixes 4 total):**
- [#27800](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/27800): Shell.BackButtonBehavior does not work with extended Tabbar
- [#30862](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/30862): Shell TabBar More button causes ViewModel command binding disconnection  
- [#31166](https://github.com/dotnet/maui/issues/31166): OnAppearing not firing if tabs are on the more tab

**Steps to Reproduce:**
1. Create Shell app with >5 tabs in TabBar (More button appears)
2. Navigate to page through More tab
3. Navigate to sub-page
4. Use back button or `GoToAsync("..")`
5. Observe: lifecycle events don't fire, back button behavior doesn't work

**Platforms Affected:**
- [x] iOS (all issues)
- [ ] Android (works fine)
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] MacCatalyst

**Regression**: Not sure, did not test other versions

**Root Cause (from PR description):** When `IsInMoreTab` is true, `PushViewController` and `PopViewController` delegate to `UITabBarController.MoreNavigationController` instead of the base navigation controller. The `MoreNavigationController` doesn't use our `NavDelegate`, so `DidShowViewController` never fires, leaving navigation completion tasks incomplete.

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>🔧 Fix Candidates</strong></summary>

**Status**: ✅ COMPLETE

**Comparison Analysis:**

Both fixes solve the **core problem** (completion tasks not firing for More navigation) but with key differences:

| Aspect | try-fix #2 | PR's Fix | Winner |
|--------|------------|----------|--------|
| **Core fix** | Inline task completion in push/pop | Helper method `HandleMoreNavigationCompletionTasks` | Tie - both work |
| **Lines changed** | +13 lines | +24 -3 lines | try-fix (simpler) |
| **Code organization** | Inline logic | Extracted helper method | PR (better abstraction) |
| **Back button support** | ❌ Missing | ✅ Sets BackAction | **PR** (more complete) |
| **SendPop fix** | ❌ Missing | ✅ Removes unused parameter | PR (cleaner API) |
| **Scope** | Navigation completion only | Navigation completion + back button + API cleanup | **PR** (more comprehensive) |

**Key Missing Features in try-fix #2:**
1. **BackAction setup** (line 615 in PR) - Enables back button behavior for More navigation
2. **SendPop signature fix** - PR removes unused `topViewController` parameter, cleaner API
3. Both issues #27800 (BackButtonBehavior) and #31166 would NOT be fixed by try-fix #2

**Selected Fix:** **PR's fix** - More comprehensive solution that addresses ALL linked issues (#27799, #27800, #30862, #31166), not just the navigation lifecycle issue. The additional 11 lines provide critical back button support and API cleanup.

| # | Source | Approach | Test Result | Files Changed | Model | Notes |
|---|--------|----------|-------------|---------------|-------|-------|
| 1 | try-fix | Set NavDelegate on MoreNavigationController | ❌ FAIL | `ShellSectionRenderer.cs` (+7) | Claude Sonnet 4 | **Why failed:** Delegate's DidShowViewController tries to complete tasks from _completionTasks dictionary, but tasks are never added for More nav - they're only added when pushing via base controller. Need to ALSO populate _completionTasks for More pushes, not just set delegate. |
| 2 | try-fix | Manually complete tasks after More push/pop | ✅ PASS | `ShellSectionRenderer.cs` (+13) | Claude Sonnet 4 | Works! Directly completes tasks after MoreNavigationController push/pop instead of waiting for delegate. Simple approach: check _completionTasks after push, complete _popCompletionTask after pop. |
| PR | PR #27932 | HandleMoreNavigationCompletionTasks() + BackAction setup + SendPop API cleanup | ✅ PASS (Gate) | `ShellSectionRenderer.cs` (+24 -3) | - | Original PR - validated by Gate |

**Exhausted:** No (2/5 attempts)  
**Selected Fix:** [PENDING - comparing try-fix #2 vs PR]
